parsed_output.justification: Justin makes contradictory claims, first stating Mitchell is a werewolf and later claiming he saw two villagers as a Seer. Caitlynn, claiming to be the Troublemaker, states she swapped Justin and Mitchell, which would transfer the Werewolf role from Justin to Mitchell.
